name: AngelWatcher
tagline: Track sub-$10M deals worth a closer look — signals, not tips
description: A lightweight watchlist for pre-seed and seed-stage companies where implied valuation stays under ~$10M. Surfaces structured signals (xoogler-led, Tier-1 VC, YC, repeat founders, FAANG alumni, accelerators, sector heat) with a simple score so you can prioritize diligence — not investment advice.
